mapper.select: SELECT terms_id AS termsId, terms_type AS termsType, title AS title, content AS content, required_yn AS requiredYn, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdDate FROM terms WHERE use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY terms_id DESC

SELECT terms_id AS termsId, terms_type AS termsType, title AS title, content AS content, required_yn AS requiredYn, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdDate FROM terms WHERE terms_id = #{termsId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
